description_long: This is a classic submachine gun with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, a black metal receiver, and a prominent round drum magazine. The rifle features a long, slender barrel and a simple iron sight system. The wooden components have a polished, reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal body. A greenish-brown fabric sling is attached to the rifle, allowing for easy carrying. Two drum magazines, one attached and one placed beside the rifle, are visible, with the exposed cartridges adding detail. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th-century military firearms, combining robust wood and metal construction.
description: A vintage submachine gun with a wooden stock and foregrip, black metal body, and a round drum magazine, accompanied by a fabric sling and spare magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and foregrip, attached drum magazine, and spare drum magazine on the ground.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular face of the drum magazine, the barrel's muzzle, and the alignment of the stock and sling.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, wooden components, and both drum magazines, with the sling draped below.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock, the back of the drum magazine, and the attachment points of the sling.
